zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher I of Denmark於1219年5月29日出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德時，他的父親Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen48歲，母親Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark27歲。他於1248年與Margaret Sambiria在丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1259年5月29日在丹麥里伯享年40歲，埋葬在丹麥里伯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher I of Denmark于1219年5月29日出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德时，他的父亲Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen48岁，母亲Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark27岁。他于1248年与Margaret Sambiria在丹麦奧本哈福哥本哈根结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1259年5月29日在丹麦里伯享年40岁，埋葬在丹麦里伯。

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Denmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher I of Denmark was born on 29 May 1219, in Roskilde, Denmark, his father, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, was 48 and his mother, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, was 27. He married Margaret Sambiria in 1248, in Copenhagen, København, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 May 1259, in Ribe, Denmark, at the age of 40, and was buried in Ribe, Denmark.

fr.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danemark
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher I of Denmark est né le 29 mai 1219, à Roskilde, Danemark, son père, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sambiria en 1248, à Copenhague, København, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1259, à Ribe, Danemark, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Ribe, Danemark.

de.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark
de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher I of Denmark am 29. Mai 1219 in Roskilde, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen 48 und seine Mutter Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark 27. Er hat 1248 in Kopenhagen, København, Dänemark Margaret Sambiria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Mai 1259 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Ribe, Dänemark und wurde in Ribe, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher I of Denmark è nato il il 29 maggio 1219 nel Roskilde, Danimarca, il suo padre, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sambiria nel 1248, nel København, København, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 maggio 1259, nel Ribe, Danimarca, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Ribe, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher I of Denmarkが1219年5月29日にデンマークロスキルドで生まれた時，父Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsenは48歳，母Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmarkは27歳であった。1248年にデンマーククoベンハヴンクoベンハヴンでMargaret Sambiriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1259年5月29日にデンマークリベで40歳で死去し，デンマークリベにて埋葬された。

ko.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드
ko.lifeSummary: Christopher I of Denmark(이)가 1219년 5월 29일 덴마크 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1248년 덴마크 ko벤하브 코펜하겐에서 Margaret Sambiria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1259년 5월 29일 덴마크 리브에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 리브에 묻혔다.

pt.29 May 1219–29 May 1259: 29 de maio de 1219–29 de maio de 1259
pt.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dinamarca
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher I of Denmark nasceu em 29 de maio de 1219, em Roskilde, Dinamarca, seu pai, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sambiria em 1248, em København, København, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1259, em Ribe, Dinamarca, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Ribe, Dinamarca.

ru.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: роскаилд, роскаилд домсогн, сoмм, кoбенавн, Дания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher I of Denmark родился 29 мая 1219 г. в местности роскаилд, Дания, его отцу по имени Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sambiria в 1248 г. в местности Копенгаген, кoбенавн, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 мая 1259 г. в местности риб, Дания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности риб, Дания.

Se casó con Margaret Sambiria en 1248, en København, København, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1259, en Ribe, Dinamarca, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Ribe, Dinamarca.
